title: Infrastructure Hosting Strategy Audit
scope: Cross-ecosystem — receptor-infra, supabase-receptor, documentation/common-bond (ISMS); all application repos as consumers

findings.description: The self-hosted k3s stack imposes an unsustainable operational burden. Engineering bandwidth is consumed by low-level cluster maintenance rather than product velocity. The cluster will be retired in favor of managed cloud services.

tasks.description: Provision Supabase Cloud (Sydney ap-southeast-2) projects for Stage/Prod and initiate migration.
Establish GCP Organization and Projects pinned to Melbourne (australia-southeast2).
Execute the decommissioning of k3s nodes once primary workloads are migrated to Cloud Run.

findings.description: Current CI/CD relies on self-hosted ARC runners and cluster-local Vault, creating a circular dependency and maintenance overhead.

tasks.description: Set up GCP Workload Identity Federation for GitHub OIDC to eliminate static secrets.
Update all repos to runs-on: ubuntu-latest and standardize on actions/cache.
Enforce a 20-minute maximum timeout on all GitHub Actions runners cross-ecosystem to prevent hung processes.

findings.description: Missing Cloud Adoption Policy in ISMS to govern the strategic shift to managed providers.

tasks.description: Create docs/compliance/iso27001/policies/cloud-adoption-policy.md documenting the move to GCP/Supabase.

findings.description: GCP, Supabase, Cloudflare, and GitHub are uncatalogued in the Supplier Security Register.
Cross-ecosystem CI/CD hardening to prevent hung runners. All workflows must have a maximum job-level timeout.

tasks.description: Enforce 'timeout-minutes: 20' across all GitHub Actions workflows in all repositories.

findings.description: GCP OIDC authentication for GitHub Actions was blocked across the ecosystem due to a missing IAM role binding. The identity pool principal lacked 'iam.serviceAccounts.getAccessToken' on the 'github-deployer' service account.

tasks.description: Refactor Foundation Terraform to grant 'roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator' to specific repository principalSets.

clarifications.decision: Full retirement of self-hosted k3s in favor of managed Supabase Cloud (Sydney) and GCP Cloud Run (Melbourne).
Transition to GCP Secret Manager (Melbourne) using OIDC-based Workload Identity Federation.

implementationPhases.name: Managed Migration (Supabase & Compute)
implementationPhases.rationale: Offloading the highest-maintenance services first to recover engineering velocity.

implementationPhases.name: CI/CD & Security Refactor
implementationPhases.rationale: Transitioning to cloud-native secrets and runners to eliminate cluster dependencies.
